input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8742 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.pekko:pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Existing 1.1.5 tests use org.apache.pekko.actor.TypedActor, TypedActorExtension, and TypedProps, but those classes are absent from pekko-actor_2.13:2.0.0-M1. This is an API-removal issue, not missing setup.

Do not add pekko-actor-typed_2.13 just to restore TypedActor coverage: it provides org.apache.pekko.actor.typed APIs, not the removed classic TypedActor APIs, and would shift coverage to a different module.
If tests choose to exercise DNS internals, JDK module exports may still matter, but the existing scaffold already has --add-exports=java.base/sun.net.dns=ALL-UNNAMED; no new setup was found.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra Maven dependency, Docker image, or environment/system property setup is required. The 2.0.0-M1 pekko-actor_2.13 artifact resolves with only scala-library and com.typesafe:config, and meaningful coverage is reachable through the classic actor APIs still present in the target artifact.
